summary:
There are no clear indications among provided options regarding reduction needed during an occlusal equilibration procedure; thus, it can't accurately determine whether either 'upper' or 'lower', nor their respective sides ('buccal') require modification based solely upon these details presented here. Given typical practices though, equal attention may indeed warrant simultaneous modifications across multiple planes if necessary per dentist discretion after thorough examination results interpretation. \boxed{B}

- Specific choice selected due lack definitive data pointing towards single correct answer amongst alternatives offered To summarize concisely focusing only on critical elements relative to your query,

This reflects standard operational guidelines rather than absolute directive derived uniquely from supplied material alone.
